Docs.summary:
Creates or updates a load balancer in the specified managed cluster.
Request Path. /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ContainerService/managedClusters/{resourceName}/loadBalancers/{loadBalancerName}.
Operation Id. LoadBalancers_CreateOrUpdate.
Default Api Version. 2026-01-02-preview.
